font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration: none; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); float: none; display: inline !important;"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>extrai o texto do PDF e mantém na memória do servidor.</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="460" x="-70" y="585" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cinQwkDnY9UYF4VpSvYr-22" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<font style="font-size: 11px;"><span style="font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration: none; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); float: none; display: inline !important;">Processa o contexto, aplica<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span></span><i data-path-to-node="14,2,0" data-index-in-node="47" style="font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-line: none; text-decoration-thickness: auto; text-decoration-style: solid; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">Chain of Thought</i><span style="font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration: none; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); float: none; display: inline !important;"><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>para identificar a emoção do usuário e gera a resposta técnica.</span></font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="280" x="40" y="930" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cinQwkDnY9UYF4VpSvYr-23" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<span style="font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration: none; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0); float: none; display: inline !important;"><font style="font-size: 11px;">O servidor FastAPI envia a resposta para a tela e exibe no balão de chat para o usuário.</font></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="270" x="10" y="1032.5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cinQwkDnY9UYF4VpSvYr-24" parent="1" style="text;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;" value="<p data-path-to-node="12,2,0" style="font-style: normal; font-variant-caps: normal; font-weight: 400; letter-spacing: normal; orphans: 2; text-align: start; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; white-space: normal; widows: 2; word-spacing: 0px; -webkit-text-stroke-width: 0px; text-decoration-line: none; text-decoration-thickness: auto; text-decoration-style: solid; caret-color: rgb(0, 0, 0); color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">O FastAPI junta 3 coisas:</p><ul><li><p data-path-to-node="12,2,1,0,0">A pergunta do usuário.</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,2,1,1,0">O texto extraído do PDF (RAG).</p></li><li><p data-path-to-node="12,2,1,2,0">O<span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span><i data-path-to-node="12,2,1,2,0" data-index-in-node="2">System Prompt</i><span class="Apple-converted-space">&nbsp;</span>(Regras de escopo e Inteligência Emocional).</p></li></ul>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="310" x="40" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
